title: Playground Browser Stack
concept: A browser-chrome redesign for power users managing many Playgrounds, with tabbed site identity, an address bar, colored save-state chips, side drawers for launch and management flows, and bottom navigation on small screens.
focus: monochrome interface with colored status chips
flows: Launch a Playground tab from Vanilla WordPress, WordPress PR, Gutenberg PR or branch, GitHub import, Blueprint URL, zip import, or selected Blueprint gallery entries.
Save a temporary Playground to browser storage or a local directory with distinct destination behavior, copy progress, and resulting saved identity.
Manage saved and unsaved Playgrounds from the Library with open, rename, delete, discard, reconnect, and save actions.
Use Site Manager drawers for settings, file browser, Blueprint editing, database tools, logs, WP Admin, Homepage, export to GitHub, and download as zip.
Browse the Blueprint catalog with category filters, search, visible selected details, inspect JSON, copy link, and run behavior.
Navigate the active WordPress site through browser chrome, refresh it, and keep temporary, reset, reload, import, and export consequences visible.
featureCoverage: Blueprint gallery with filters and search
